title: Froglightenment
description: A resource pack that retextures Froglights
body:
**Froglightenment aims to visually reimagine froglights.** I could never tell what they were supposed to be in vanilla, so I thought making them resemble something similar to pearls could be a fun way of changing that.

This resource pack also changes all of the froglights' models slightly, so that they are no longer directional pillar blocks. They function similarly to any other standard light block now.

_This is the current list of supported mods:_

- No Man's Land
- Abundant Atmosphere
- Alex's Caves
